scope: AgenC configured hook runtime dispatcher mapped from the upstream Rust hook runtime and engine.
_sourceRootBrandingAllow: branding-scan: allow upstream source root path

requiredBehaviors: validated hooks config is flattened in event and declaration order
disabled matcher groups and command handlers are omitted from live dispatch
source path and stable per-handler index are preserved for diagnostics and list output
edgeCases: several matcher aliases matching one handler select that handler once

requiredBehaviors: matching command hooks receive JSON stdin and execute in the configured working directory
exit code 0 is success, exit code 2 is blocking, other exits are non-blocking errors
timeouts and abort signals terminate the subprocess and record diagnostics
edgeCases: hooks that exit without reading stdin do not crash the runtime
disabled runtime records skipped diagnostics for direct test runs

requiredBehaviors: structured hookSpecificOutput is normalized for PreToolUse, PermissionRequest, PostToolUse, UserPromptSubmit, and lifecycle hooks
malformed or unsupported fields are reported as diagnostics rather than throwing
raw command output remains available for parser decisions while user-facing diagnostics are redacted
edgeCases: non-JSON stdout remains an implicit non-structured hook result
invalid permissionDecision values are ignored and surfaced as diagnostic errors

requiredBehaviors: PermissionRequest command hook decisions feed the approval pipeline before the resolver
allow decisions approve the tool call and deny decisions reject it
ask/pass decisions continue to the normal resolver and guardian approval reviewer path
edgeCases: non-success PermissionRequest command runs pass through without changing approval behavior
hook denial reason remains redacted before it reaches model/user-facing surfaces
